content.body:
Restructure README from internal documentation to landing page:
- Hero section with emotional hook and before/after comparison
- Quick Start in 3 steps instead of 10 commands
- "What Makes It Different" section with 4 clear differentiators
- "Current Status" with honest roadmap
- Commands table moved down as reference, not showcase

Add /posts/ to gitignore for internal marketing content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: docs: rewrite README for conversion + add /posts/ to gitignore
